title: triticum aestivum var. spelta
intro: Triticum aestivum var. spelta, also known as spelt, is a type of ancient grain that belongs to the wheat family. The medicinal properties of spelt include its high content of antioxidants, fiber, and minerals, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of consuming spelt include improved digestion, reduced inflammation, and a lower risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and diabetes. Spelt can be prepared as a tea, flour, or supplement, and is often used in traditional medicine to support digestive health and boost the immune system.
